name: Lexicata (Clio Grow) Legal CRM and Intake API
what_it_does: Lexicata (now Clio Grow) legal CRM and client intake REST API for law firm lead management, intake forms, e-signatures, and client conversion automation. Enables AI agents to manage legal lead capture and pipeline tracking for law firm business development automation, handle digital intake form delivery and e-signature for client onboarding automation, access matter opening and client creation workflow for new client automation, retrieve intake questionnaire and case evaluation data for legal screening automation, manage consultation scheduling and appointment booking for client intake workflow, handle document assembly and engagement letter generation for client onboarding, access lead source attribution and marketing analytics for law firm ROI measurement, retrieve client communication and follow-up automation for lead conversion, manage conflict check workflow and matter screening for intake compliance, and integrate Clio Grow with Clio Manage, practice management systems, and legal marketing platforms.
use_cases: Capturing legal leads from intake automation agents
Sending intake forms from client onboarding agents
Scheduling consultations from legal booking agents
Tracking lead sources from law firm marketing agents
not_for: Non-legal professional services without intake and CRM needs
Court or government without law firm client development
In-house corporate legal without client intake focus
best_when: A consumer-facing law firm (personal injury, family law, criminal defense, immigration) using Clio Grow wanting AI agents to automate lead capture, intake form delivery, consultation scheduling, engagement letter generation, and matter opening.
avoid_when: ATTORNEY-CLIENT PRIVILEGE IN INTAKE DATA: Legal intake questionnaire data may be protected by attorney-client privilege once attorney-client relationship begins; automated intake data handling must implement privilege protection from first client communication. Unauthorized practice of law — automated legal advice, case evaluation, or legal strategy recommendations without attorney supervision constitutes UPL; automated intake screening must be administrative, not legal advice. Fee agreement formation — automated engagement letter generation and e-signature creates binding fee agreements; ensure engagement letter terms are reviewed and legally appropriate before automated deployment. IOLTA trust accounting — automated retainer collection through Clio Grow must route to IOLTA trust account, not operating account; automated payment routing errors create state bar trust accounting violations.

auth.notes: Lexicata acquired by Clio (2019) and rebranded as Clio Grow. Uses Clio OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Same API platform as Clio Manage. Vancouver, BC HQ. Clio founded 2008 (private, TA Associates/OMERS PE). Clio Grow is the CRM and intake product within Clio's legal platform. Competes with Lawmatics, Filevine Grow, and HubSpot for law firm CRM and intake.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user monthly subscription (Clio Grow)
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly subscription; Clio Grow + Clio Manage bundles available
pricing.notes: Vancouver, BC. TA Associates/OMERS PE. Clio founded 2008. Lexicata acquired 2019, rebranded as Clio Grow. Part of Clio legal platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client (shared Clio API limits); documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: ATTORNEY-CLIENT PRIVILEGE PROTECTION: Intake questionnaire responses may become privileged once attorney-client relationship begins; automated data routing and third-party sharing of intake data must implement privilege protection from initial client contact

UPL automated intake screening — automated case evaluation, damages estimates, or legal advice in intake workflow constitutes unauthorized practice of law; automated intake screening must be administrative routing, not legal assessment

IOLTA trust retainer routing — automated retainer payment collection must route to IOLTA trust account; automated payment routing to operating account creates state bar trust accounting violation; verify payment routing before deploying automated intake with retainer

E-signature fee agreement binding — automated engagement letter e-signature creates binding attorney-client fee agreements; ensure attorney reviews engagement letter terms before automated signature capture deployment
Clio API rate limits — Clio Grow uses Clio platform API which has per-user and per-app rate limits; automated high-volume intake processing must implement rate limit tracking and queuing
Conflict check automation — automated conflict of interest check must run before matter opening; automated matter creation without conflict check creates legal malpractice risk in conflict situations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Legal CRM and intake. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US/CA/EU. Client intake and privilege-protected data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal CRM and intake. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US/CA/EU. Client intake and attorney-client data.
